# StreamStage

> Canada's dance industry partner — media production, software, and live broadcast.

StreamStage provides professional livestreaming, videography, and video production for dance competitions, recitals, showcases, and business events across Canada. We also build purpose-built software for the dance industry.

## Services

### Dance & Stage Media
- Multi-camera livestreaming for competitions, recitals, and showcases
- Videography and editing (highlight reels, performance archives, promotional content)
- Cinematic promotional videos for dance studios
- Short-form social content (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

### Recital Media
- Professional multi-camera recital recording with 1-week turnaround
- Live streaming for remote families with unlimited viewers
- Professional photography (10-15 stills per routine)
- Transparent per-dancer pricing — studio keeps 100% of revenue
- Interactive proposal builder at /dancerecital

### Dance Studio Promos
- Gimbal-operated movement cameras for dynamic b-roll
- Interview setups with professional lighting and audio
- 30-second social reels, 1-minute brand stories, 10-second teasers
- Volume discounts up to 20%
- Interactive package builder at /dancepromo

### Business Video
- Hybrid event production (live + virtual)
- Social media highlights and reels
- Brand and promotional videos
- End-to-end video strategy

## Software Products

- CompSync (https://compsync.net) — All-in-one dance competition management platform. Registration, scheduling, scoring, live results. Free to use.
- StudioSage — AI-powered assistant for dance studio owners. Manages communication and reduces admin workload.
- StudioBeat — Unified studio management platform. Class scheduling, attendance, billing, and parent communication.

## Team
- Daniel Abrahamson — Founder & Creative Director
- Kayla James — Creative Director

## Stats
- 100+ events streamed
- 500+ videos produced
- 50+ studios served
- 10+ years experience

## Location
Ontario, Canada (serving clients across Canada)

## Links
- [Home](https://streamstage.live): Full-service dance media, business video, and software

- [Recital Proposal Builder](https://streamstage.live/dancerecital): Build a custom recital media proposal with transparent per-dancer pricing
- [Promo Package Builder](https://streamstage.live/dancepromo): Build a custom promo video package for your dance studio
- [Blog](https://streamstage.live/blog): Tips, guides, and insights for dance studios and performing arts professionals
- [Dance & Stage Media](https://streamstage.live/#dance-media): Multi-camera livestreaming, videography, and promotional content
- [Dance Software](https://streamstage.live/#software): CompSync, StudioSage, and StudioBeat
- [CompSync](https://compsync.net): Free dance competition management platform
- [Business Video](https://streamstage.live/#business-video): Professional video production for businesses
